title: Looking into farmers' knowledge and use of biological plant protection in Latvia
description: Examines farmers’ knowledge and use of biological plant protection methods in Latvia’s Vidzeme region, showing that organic, small-scale, and greenhouse producers rely on experience-based practices such as slurry sprays, plant infusions, crop rotation, and companion planting. It identifies limited access to commercial BPP products due to insufficient information and advisory support and recommends enhancing agricultural education and extension services to promote wider, informed uptake of both non-commercial and commercial BPP methods.
